concepts.name: Concept MCP Server
concepts.definition: Stdio MCP server that exposes concept governance, task preparation, candidate detection, and record tools.
concepts.boundary: MCP tool registration, request dispatch, repository selection, and structured tool responses.

concepts.name: Concept Repository
concepts.definition: Storage abstraction for project concepts, relations, proposed concepts, and validation decisions.
concepts.boundary: Read and write access to concept records, concept relations, and review decision records.

concepts.name: Concept Task Preparation
concepts.definition: Preparation step that packages relevant concepts, relations, and required workflow before design or implementation.
concepts.boundary: Task-to-concept mapping prompt, concept snapshot, host actions, and expected output schema.

concepts.name: Concept Governance Policy
concepts.definition: Workflow policy that tells a host AI to read concept files first and keep design work inside explicit concept boundaries.
concepts.boundary: Activation prompt, required workflow, and host actions for concept-governed mode.

concepts.name: Conflict Candidate Detection
concepts.definition: Structural and heuristic pass that finds possible concept identity, boundary, hierarchy, inflation, and cycle problems.
concepts.boundary: Candidate generation, severity scoring, scope filtering, and evidence references before independent review.

concepts.name: Agent Review Request
concepts.definition: Portable request bundle for an independent host AI review of detected conflict candidates.
concepts.boundary: Review objective, independence requirement, input bundle, analysis prompt, and expected schema.

concepts.name: Concept Recording
concepts.definition: Writable workflow for persisting proposed concepts and validation decisions back to the concept repository.
concepts.boundary: Concept proposal records, optional relations, validation decisions, and recorded timestamps.

concepts.name: Host Adapter
concepts.definition: Library API that renders concept task and conflict review requests for Claude, Codex, and Copilot hosts.
concepts.boundary: Prompt rendering and host launch request shape, not MCP runtime agent launching.

concepts.name: Concept Inventory
concepts.definition: Discovery workflow that extracts and classifies candidate concepts for a project before a repository is mature.
concepts.boundary: Candidate discovery, canonical naming, source evidence, initial status assignment, and relation drafting.

concepts.name: Concept Authenticity Check
concepts.definition: Review workflow that distinguishes real project concepts from aliases, implementation details, prompt inventions, and over-specialized labels.
concepts.boundary: Source evidence, ownership, lifecycle, boundary, support, duplication, and specialization checks before concept acceptance.
